# Rival Regulatory Toolkit

Rival Regulatory Toolkit is an open-source SDK, CLI, MCP server, OpenAPI contract, and schema package for connecting AI agents to Rival's source-grounded regulatory retrieval API.

Public site: https://tryrival.ai
Agent access: https://tryrival.ai/for-agents
Repository: https://github.com/rival-intelligence/rival-regulatory-toolkit

## Agent Use

Use this repository when an AI agent needs read-only access to regulatory source discovery, source text retrieval, citation tracing, authority metadata, or recent filings.

The MCP server exposes:

- `search_regulatory_corpus`: search regulatory source material and return source-grounded excerpts.
- `retrieve_source_text`: retrieve full source text and metadata for a source id or citation.
- `trace_citation`: resolve a citation to matching and related regulatory sources.
- `list_authorities`: list available regulatory authorities and source families.
- `get_recent_filings`: inspect recent indexed filings.

## Safety Boundary

This toolkit is read-only. It does not submit filings, alter compliance records, create evidence requests, close corrective actions, delete evidence, or take external regulatory actions. Regulated work requires qualified human review.

## Important Files

- `README.md`: human setup guide.
- `server.json`: MCP Registry metadata.
- `openapi/rival-regulatory-api.yaml`: read-only REST API contract.
- `schemas/`: JSON Schemas for source and citation data.
- `src/mcp/server.ts`: MCP server implementation.
- `src/client.ts`: TypeScript API client.
- `fixtures/sample-corpus.jsonl`: local fixture corpus for no-key evaluation.

## Install

```sh
npx -y @tryrival/regulatory-toolkit mcp
```

Fixture mode:

```sh
RIVAL_FIXTURE_MODE=true npx -y @tryrival/regulatory-toolkit mcp
```
